title: Protocol E: Preparation of pretreatment buffer
steps: 40 mM HEPES-KOH pH 7.5, 34 mM Lithium Citrate, and 15% (w/v) PEG 8000
• 60.6 mg of L-cysteine (Sigma 30089-25G) in 100 ml of pretreatment buffer
• Place open container of pretreatment buffer in an evacuated chamber • This step is important to maintain the reducing potential of L-cysteine
• If using a vacuum driven filter, keep the vacuum on for 15 min to further degas the solution
creator: David Booth
